channel.title: Open-Source on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Open-Source on Arrans github.io

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: godotengine/godot
item.description: Godot Engine – Multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine

item.title: videolan/vlc
item.description: VLC media player - All pull requests are ignored, please use MRs on https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc

item.title: transloadit/uppy
item.description: The next open source file uploader for web browsers 🐶

item.title: opengaming/osgameclones
item.description: Open Source Clones of Popular Games

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Continue is the leading open-source AI code assistant. You can connect any models and any context to build custom autocomplete and chat experiences inside VS Code and JetBrains

item.title: storj/storj
item.description: Ongoing Storj v3 development. Decentralized cloud object storage that is affordable, easy to use, private, and secure.

item.title: sismics/docs
item.description: Lightweight document management system packed with all the features you can expect from big expensive solutions

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.title: Budibase/budibase
item.description: Low code platform for building business apps and workflows in minutes. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Rest API, Docker, K8s, and more 🚀

item.title: swagger-api/swagger-codegen
item.description: swagger-codegen contains a template-driven engine to generate documentation, API clients and server stubs in different languages by parsing your OpenAPI / Swagger definition.

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: OpenDiablo2/OpenDiablo2
item.description: An open source re-implementation of Diablo 2

item.title: endless-sky/endless-sky
item.description: Space exploration, trading, and combat game.

item.title: cxong/cdogs-sdl
item.description: Classic overhead run-and-gun game

item.title: TrianguloY/UrlChecker
item.description: Android app by TrianguloY: URLCheck

item.title: neherlab/covid19_scenarios
item.description: Models of COVID-19 outbreak trajectories and hospital demand

item.title: akhilrex/podgrab
item.description: A self-hosted podcast manager/downloader/archiver tool to download podcast episodes as soon as they become live with an integrated player.

item.title: StartBootstrap/startbootstrap-business-casual
item.description: A Bootstrap HTML theme for business websites - created by Start Bootstrap

item.title: RayJW/awesome-foss
item.description: A collection of all the FOSS software I regularly use or follow to keep track of privacy respecting alternatives. This is a mirror of a Codeberg repository.
